title: Assertion Failure in genrtlil.cc When Handling Signedness

features.name: signed_reg_slice_with_dollar_signed
features.description: Code should include a signed register declaration with a slice that is passed through $signed() conversion

features.name: ternary_in_signed_cast_with_negation
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator returning the same constant value used inside a $signed cast with unary negation

features.name: signed_comparison_with_bitwise_negation
features.description: Code should include a comparison with $signed expression that is then negated with bitwise NOT operator

features.name: signed_unsigned_reg_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a concatenation that mixes signed and unsigned registers with sizes 11, 19, and 20 bits
